SEARCH
Module com.example.simul2d
Package com.example.simul2d.grid

Class Cell

java.lang.Object
com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Cell extends Object implements Serializable
A grid cell used by the simulation to represent a discrete location.

Each Cell stores an integer 2D position (Vec2) and a collection of Entity instances present at that location. com.example.simul2d.Entities are stored in a map keyed by their concrete class which ensures at most one instance per concrete entity type can be associated with a single cell.

This class is intentionally lightweight — it does not perform any simulation logic itself; it only provides storage for position and entity references used by higher-level simulation code.

See Also:
  • Vec2
  • Entity
  • Serialized Form

    • Cell

      public Cell()

    • Cell

      public Cell(int x, int y)
      Constructs a new Cell at the provided integer coordinates with an empty entity collection.
      Parameters:
      x - the x coordinate
      y - the y coordinate

  • Method Details

    • getMaterial

      public Material getMaterial()
      Returns:
      the material of the cell

    • setMaterial

      public void setMaterial(Material material)
      Parameters:
      material - the material to set for the cell

    • getTotalGrowthOnCell

      public int getTotalGrowthOnCell()
      Returns the aggregated growth across all CanGrow entities in this cell.
      Returns:
      the total growth on the cell

    • getMinGrowthValueToFight

      public int getMinGrowthValueToFight()

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()

    • updateTotalGrowthOnCell

      public int updateTotalGrowthOnCell()
      Recomputes the total growth value of all growable entities in the cell.
      Returns:
      the updated total growth value of the cell

    • step

      public void step()
      Executes a simulation step for this cell, updating all contained entities that implement CanGrow. Each growable entity's growth is updated based on the current total growth on the cell, and the total is updated accordingly after each entity's growth step.

    • addEntity

      public int addEntity(Entity entity)
      Adds the provided entity to this cell.

      If an entity of the same concrete class is already present the new instance will not be added.

      Parameters:
      entity - the entity to add (must not be null)
      Returns:
      0 (placeholder return value currently unused)

    • getColorHex

      public String getColorHex()

    • getEntity

      public Entity getEntity(Entities entity)
      Retrieves the entity of the specified concrete class present in this cell.
      Parameters:
      entity - the concrete class of the entity to retrieve
      Returns:
      the entity instance if present, or null if no such entity is stored in this cell

    • getCombatEnabledEntities

      public HashMap<Entities,Entity> getCombatEnabledEntities()

    • getEntities

      public HashMap<Entities,Entity> getEntities()

    • removeEntity

      public void removeEntity(Entities entityClass)

    • clearEntities

      public void clearEntities()

    • getPos

      public Vec2 getPos()
      Returns the cell's Vec2 position. The returned object is the actual instance used by this cell; callers modifying it will change the cell's stored coordinates.
      Returns:
      the position vector (never null)

    • setPos

      public void setPos(Vec2 pos)
      Replaces this cell's position with the supplied Vec2.
      Parameters:
      pos - the new position

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
